name: Figgs Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover salt meat with cold water and soak overnight.
2. Drain the salt meat, then add fresh water to cover it.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer for about 2 hours.
4. Peel the carrots and parsnips, cutting them in half lengthwise.
5. Cut peeled potatoes into halves and turnip into thick slices.
6. Cut cabbage into large wedges.
7. Wash all vegetables in cold water.
8. Add the vegetables to the meat about 30 minutes before it is cooked.
9. Peas pudding goes well with this dish.
